note: 6 of these (Tokyo/Osaka/Singapore/Bangkok/Paris/London) overlap with data/travel_a2a/development/'s destinations by name only -- formal_workload/content/ bundles for them are separately generated and richer (3-5+ options vs. development's 2), never shared or read from development/content/.
origin_note: Kept to 4 values (per Step 6.5-6's '2~4 수준으로 제한') to avoid content-bundle explosion; Tokyo/Singapore double as both an origin (for cross-Asia business_trip instances) and a destination (for other instances) without conflict, since origin/destination are resolved per task_instance, not globally reserved.
diversity_requirement: Each of the 50 task instances must differ from every other instance on at least 3 of: destination, trip_duration bucket, traveler bucket, budget_level, required_services combination, preference type, workflow branch, template_family, constraint_types combination, expected artifact requirements (Step 6.5-2). Checked by near_duplicate_report in Phase 6.5C, not enforced here.
